metadata.notes: structured_keep drops a local anchor neighborhood by retaining farthest points, matching existing PointGPT support-stress protocol; input-level FPS is skipped when the H5 point count already equals npoints.

ShapeNetPart top-k is computed under the standard known-category part-label restriction used by the original evaluation. grouping_mode is an eval-time patchization perturbation with checkpoint/readout fixed; fps_knn is the unmodified path. Support perturbation metrics are computed on unique retained original point indices. When retained support is resampled for the fixed-size forward pass, logits are averaged back to each original retained point before mIoU/top-k computation; checkpoint loaded with exact model-key coverage.

ShapeNetPart top-k is computed under the standard known-category part-label restriction used by the original evaluation. grouping_mode is an eval-time patchization perturbation with checkpoint/readout fixed; fps_knn is the unmodified path. Support perturbation metrics are computed on unique retained original point indices. When retained support is resampled for the fixed-size forward pass, logits are averaged back to each original retained point before mIoU/top-k computation; checkpoint loaded with exact model-key coverage.

ShapeNetPart top-k is computed under the standard known-category part-label restriction used by the original evaluation. grouping_mode is an eval-time patchization perturbation with checkpoint/readout fixed; fps_knn is the unmodified path. Support perturbation metrics are computed on unique retained original point indices. When retained support is resampled for the fixed-size forward pass, logits are averaged back to each original retained point before mIoU/top-k computation; ignored unexpected checkpoint keys: conv_fuse.0.weight, conv_fuse.1.weight, conv_fuse.1.bias, conv_fuse.1.running_mean, conv_fuse.1.running_var, conv_fuse.1.num_batches_tracked.
